response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years fullstack requirement with 16+ years of experience across web, mobile, and systems development. Current role at re:cinq directly demonstrates AI agent infrastructure work (explicit requirement), and career history shows deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with proven ability to scale systems handling millions of requests. Gaps in Nest.js and specific testing frameworks are minor given strong foundational expertise.
strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement with 16+ years as fullstack engineer, including recent Staff role at re:cinq
Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks directly addresses AI agent development requirement
Strong primary stack match with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK; proven experience scaling systems and implementing microservices
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary stack requirement (though Node.js and GraphQL expertise is extensive)
Vitest/Jest not explicitly mentioned in resume; testing framework experience inferred but not detailed
Limited Kotlin/Java experience and Kubernetes only mentioned in personal GISCollective project, not enterprise context
